events.title: Lunar New Year Sound Journey
events.description: Please join me for a sound journey to mark the Lunar New Year — a 1 hour journey of gongs and bowls from the Himalayas.

events.title: Full Moon Sound Bath
events.description: Bathe in the resonance of crystal bowls and gongs under the full moon's energy. Release what no longer serves you and welcome new intentions.

events.title: Autumn Equinox Ceremony
events.description: Mark the turning of the seasons with a special outdoor sound ceremony. As day and night find balance, we'll journey through sound to find our own equilibrium.

events.title: New Moon Soundbath
events.description: Come join us for an evening soundbath

events.title: Sound Bath with Luke Collins - Himalayan Sound Healing
events.description:
Held in the beautiful space of the Flourmill in Newtown, a journey of sound, energy and presence with ancient instruments from the Himalayas
The event is an immersion into the traditional sound healing of the Himalayas. When combined with yoga nidra and breath, as has been known for thousands of years , this work can bring deep calibration of the nervous system and energy. A bit about me , I trained in Nepal on the very instruments I sought and brought back. Many of which are hundreds of years old that form a link back to the old traditions and lineages of the masters who were the custodians before me.
